regional_cost_note: Solar panel installers in Whangārei typically quote $12,500–$17,000 for a 5kW system installed, and $21,000–$30,000 for a 10kW system. Battery storage adds $8,500–$15,000. Northland rates are broadly in line with the national average, with some capacity constraints for specialist trades. Compare quotes carefully — system size, panel brand, inverter quality, and export metering arrangements all affect the total cost and payback period.
